source_note: Authoritative monster stats extracted from Call of Cthulhu Keeper Rulebook (40th Anniversary / Sandy Petersen edition), Chapter 14: Monsters, Beasts, and Alien Gods. PDF page idx = printed page + 11. Used by gap_audit.py for content verification. Values verified by reading the PDF stat blocks directly.

convention.STR/CON/SIZ/DEX/INT/POW: characteristic averages (integer), or 'N/A' if the rulebook marks it Not Applicable
convention.armor: integer armor points (leading number in Armor: line); 'special' if rulebook gives a non-numeric rule (e.g. immunity); null/omitted if no Armor line
convention.san_loss: dice as 'success_loss/failure_loss' from the Sanity Loss line

Colour Out of Space.source_note: CON N/A; SIZ equals POW; STR given per 50 POW; HP N/A (no hit points). Armor: normal weapons cannot harm.

Dagon.rulebook_name: Dagon and Hydra, Rulers of the deep ones
Dagon.source_note: Dagon shares a stat block with Mother Hydra (identical stats).

Dark Young of Shub-Niggurath.source_note: Armor: firearms do 1 pt per bullet (2 impale); hand-to-hand normal; heat/blast/corrosion/electrical/poison no effect.

Dhole.source_note: Armor equal to one-fifth of POW.

Formless Spawn.source_note: Immune to all physical weapons, even enchanted ones; wounds snap closed. Spells may harm.

Hound of Tindalos.source_note: Armor: only weapons/attacks from beyond time can harm; regenerates 4 HP/round unless contacted by 3-D being.

Shoggoth.source_note: Armor: none, but firearms do half damage; impales do not get bonus die.

Vampire.source_note: Armor: 0 but reforms after HP exceeded. SAN 0/1D4 attacked, 1/1D3 to witness transformation.

Werewolf.source_note: SIZ 55 humanoid (65 giant wolf form). Armor 1-pt hide + regenerates 1 HP/round except wounds from silver.

Zombie.source_note: No INT. Armor: major wounds cause limb loss; otherwise ignore damage except to head.

Ghost.source_note: Crafted by Keeper; only INT and POW. Max SAN loss 1D8. Attacks via opposed POW (loser loses 2D10 POW). No fixed STR/CON/SIZ/HP.

Cthulhu.source_note: Armor 21 + regenerates 6 HP/round; at 0 HP bursts and reforms in 1D10+10 min.

Azathoth.source_note: Seething nuclear chaos. At 0 HP dispelled (not slain), returns in 1D6 hours. 3D6 damage from Elder Sign.

Hastur.rulebook_name: Hastur, He Who Is Not to Be Named
Hastur.source_note: Hastur the GOO itself (p320). The King in Yellow (p321) is a frequently-encountered avatar with different stats: STR 125 CON 530 SIZ 70 DEX 135 INT 250 POW 175 HP 60.

Nyarlathotep.source_note: Human form. Monstrous Form: STR 400 CON 250 SIZ 450 DEX 95 INT 430 POW 500 HP 70. Multiple avatars (Bloody Tongue, Black Pharaoh, etc.).

Shub-Niggurath.source_note: Armor: no armor, but slimy mist body immune to physical weapons; magic/fire/electricity damage normally; regenerates via magic points.

Yog-Sothoth.source_note: Armor: none, but only magical weapons damage. SAN 1D10/1D100 spherical form; no cost for Tawil at'Umr form.

Gnorri.source_note: NOT IN CORE RULEBOOK. Gnorri are a supplements-only race (Malleus Monstrorum / scenario material). Any stats are scenario-defined; no rulebook page.

Zoog.source_note: NOT IN CORE RULEBOOK. Zoogs appear in Lovecraft's Dreamlands fiction and the Call of Cthulhu Dreamlands supplement, not the core Keeper Rulebook. Any stats are supplement-defined.

Walter Corbitt.source_note: NOT A RULEBOOK MONSTER. Walter Corbitt is a scenario NPC from the classic 'Haunted House' / Corbitt House introductory scenario (Ch.16 quick-start), not a Chapter 14 monster. Stats are scenario-defined; our data (STR 90 CON 115 SIZ 55 DEX 35 INT 80 POW 90 HP 16) reflects that scenario.
